resources.string: Social Spark
Daily connection boost
Find a social spark for this moment
Type a time of day and get a small, meaningful idea to help you reach out.
What part of the day is it?
Try Morning, Afternoon, or Evening.
Enter time of day
Show my spark
Reset
Your spark will appear here
Enter Morning, Afternoon, or Evening to unlock two easy social ideas.
Please type a time of day first.
Morning spark
1. Send a “Good morning” text to a family member.\n2. Reach out to a colleague with a quick “Thank you.”
Afternoon spark
1. Share a funny meme or interesting link with a friend.\n2. Send a quick “Thinking of you” message.
Evening spark
1. Call a friend or relative for a 5-minute catch-up.\n2. Leave a thoughtful comment on a friend’s post.
Try one of the main times
Please enter Morning, Afternoon, or Evening so I can match you with the right social spark.
